# 001 — Spike: install Tabby MCP and inspect tool schemas

Labels: `type:spike`, `area:mcp`, `priority:p0`

## Goal

Verify GentlemanHu/Tabby-MCP can support the required CLI flows.

## Acceptance

- MCP server runs inside Tabby.
- MCPorter lists tool schemas.
- Required tools are identified: list, read buffer, send input, focus pane, split pane, new tab/profile open, execute command.
- Gaps are filed as follow-up issues.
